mapper.sql: select f.fee_id, f.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, s.default_object_dimension as scene_default_object_dimension, f.fee_code, f.fee_name, f.fee_category, f.unit_code, f.factor_summary, f.scope_description, f.object_dimension, f.sort_no, f.status, f.remark, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id

where.if: and ( f.fee_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or f.fee_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: order by f.update_time desc, f.fee_id desc
order by s.scene_name asc, f.sort_no asc, f.fee_id asc

select count(1) as feeCount, coalesce(sum(case when f.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledFeeCount, count(distinct f.scene_id) as sceneCoverageCount from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id

select f.fee_id as feeId, f.scene_id as sceneId, s.scene_code as sceneCode, s.scene_name as sceneName, f.fee_code as feeCode, f.fee_name as feeName, f.status as status, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.fee_id = f.fee_id) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from cost_fee_variable_rel rel where rel.fee_id = f.fee_id) as variableRelCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_snapshot snap join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = snap.version_id where ver.scene_id = f.scene_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'FEE' and snap.object_code = f.fee_code) as publishedVersionCount, (select count(1) from cost_result_ledger l where l.fee_id = f.fee_id) as resultLedgerCount from cost_fee_item f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id where f.fee_id = #{feeId}
mapper.insert:
insert into cost_fee_variable_rel ( scene_id, fee_id, variable_id, relation_type, source_type, source_rule_id, source_code, sort_no, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values
( #{item.sceneId}, #{item.feeId}, #{item.variableId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.sourceType}, #{item.sourceRuleId}, #{item.sourceCode}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.remark}, 'system', sysdate(), 'system', sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from cost_fee_variable_rel where source_type = 'RULE_DERIVED' and fee_id in
#{feeId}
